# crusoe_registry_token (Resource)

Manages a container registry token for authentication.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "crusoe_registry_token" "example" {
  alias = "my-token"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `alias` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Token used to authenticate to the container registry.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import crusoe_registry_token.example <token_id>
```
